allow: Bash(curl -s --max-time 15 http://spaelapv08.nw1.nwestnetwork.com:8080/api/graphql -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"Dataset\\"\) { fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } }"}')
